abilities.name: soundproof
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is immune to moves flagged as being sound-based. Heal Bell is unaffected. Uproar still prevents this Pokémon from sleeping. This Pokémon can still receive a Perish Song counter through Baton Pass, and will retain a Perish Song counter if it acquires this ability after Perish Song is used. Howl, Roar of Time, Sonic Boom, and Yawn are not flagged as sound-based.
abilities.flavorText: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.

abilities.name: static
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed. Pokémon that are immune to Electric-type moves can still be paralyzed by this ability. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, there is a 50% chance that encounters will be with an Electric Pokémon, if applicable.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: aftermath
abilities.shortEffect: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is knocked out by a move that makes contact, the move's user takes 1/4 its maximum HP in damage.
abilities.flavorText: Damages the attacker if it knocks out the Pokémon with a move that makes direct contact.
